There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/quantity-precision'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.2.0', found versions: 4.0.1 (from hl7.fhir.r4.core#4.0.1), 5.1.0-cibuild (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.1.0-snapshot1), 5.2.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.2.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/quantity-precision' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/quantity-precision|5.2.0'

The extension http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/regex|5.2.0 is deprecated with the note: 'This was deprecated in favor of using a constraint on the element using FHIRPath, since constraints allow for the provision of a human readable message associated with the regex'

Pinned the version of http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0074 to 3.0.0 from choices of 2.0.0 (hl7.terminology.r4#6.5.0), 3.0.0 (hl7.terminology.r4#7.1.0)

Wrong Display Name 'Physiological study' for http://snomed.info/sct#252416005. Valid display is one of 2 choices: 'Histopathology test' (en) or 'Histopathology test (procedure)' (en) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

Wrong Display Name 'Rehabilitation procedure' for http://snomed.info/sct#385805005. Valid display is one of 6 choices: 'Diabetic care education (regime/therapy)' (en), 'Diabetic care education' (en), 'Teach diabetic care' (en), 'Diabetic care education (procedure)' (en), 'Health education - diabetes (regime/therapy)' (en) or 'Health education - diabetes' (en) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

Wrong Display Name 'Patient education and counseling' for http://snomed.info/sct#311401005. Valid display is one of 3 choices: 'Patient education' (en), 'Patient education (procedure)' (en) or 'Patient education (regime/therapy)' (en) (for the language(s) 'en, en-US'). Note that the display in the ValueSet does not have to match; this check exists to help check that it's not accidentally the wrong code

The code '409035000' is not valid in the system http://snomed.info/sct (Unknown code '409035000' in the CodeSystem 'http://snomed.info/sct' version 'http://snomed.info/sct/900000000000207008/version/20250201' (International Edition))
Published value sets SHOULD conform to the ShareableValueSet profile, which says that the element ValueSet.experimental is mandatory, but it is not present
URL Mismatch http://314e.com/fhir/ig/ValueSet/servicerequest-category-314e vs http://314e.com/fhir/ValueSet/servicerequest-category-314e
